longDescription: Discover Zurich Card for 24 or 72 hours in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: City Pass
subcategory.description: Find the right City Pass for your travel plans. With a City Pass you have the opportunity to save money on various attractions in a city. City Pass discounts are offered by different organizations and for different purposes. For example, they apply to transportation tickets, museums, attractions or sports activities. (Photo: Giglio Pasqua , Switzerland Tourism)

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: City tour: Discover narrow alleys with groups and guides during your city exploration tour in summer.
Museum Zurich: Discover impressive artworks in an inspiring gallery.
Boat Zurich: Enjoy the city cruise on the water with views of the old town and church.
Tram in Zurich in front of the main train station, lively city atmosphere and beautiful architecture
Bürkliterrasse: Beautiful place to relax in Munich with people, trees, and artworks in autumn.
Zürich Card: Experience transport, museums, restaurants, and much more in Zurich.
Zürich Bahnhof: modern travel with trains and a vibrant atmosphere in Switzerland.
Huerlimann Zurich: Relax in the exclusive spa with a modern indoor pool and stylish atmosphere.
